title: Director Development
raw_description: Our close-knit, dynamic team is made up of experts dedicated to accelerating investments in clean energy. We are looking for team members who share our drive, our passion for renewable energy, and our belief that individuals can make a difference in the fight against the climate crisis. We believe that the highest-performing team is one where employees are fulfilled in their work life and also outside of it. CleanCapital offers a holistic program that supports physical, mental-emotional, and financial wellness. Ample paid time off, flexible work schedules including hybrid and remote work, and fully paid-for are just some of the ways we support our team and their families.
